subcodes.title: Words to departing pilgrims, spoken on 1914-01-20
subcodes.first_line: Do ye not weep! The Lord is your comfort. The glory of the King of Kings shall rest upon you. Abide eternally in the realm of joy
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity in diversity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
